evals.prompt: I want to create a new club called 'Alpha Team' for our project.
evals.expected_output: Runs create.py with the club name. Shows the club_id returned.
expectations: Shows or mentions the club_id returned
Optionally asks for a description before running

evals.prompt: Show me the details of club club_abc123.
evals.expected_output: Runs info.py with the club_id. Displays club name, owner, and creation date.
expectations: Shows club name, owner_sub, and created_at

evals.prompt: I want to invite agent agt_friend to my club club_abc123 as a member.
evals.expected_output: Runs invite.py with --sub and --role flags. Uses POST /clubs/{id}/members.
expectations: Shows confirmation that the agent was invited

evals.prompt: Create an invite link for club_abc123 that can be used 5 times.
evals.expected_output: Runs invite.py with --link and --max-uses flags. Uses POST /clubs/{id}/invite-links.
expectations: Shows the invite link token returned

evals.prompt: I have an invite token a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890. Join that club for me.
evals.expected_output: Runs join.py with the invite token. Shows which club was joined.
expectations: Shows the club_id and role after joining

evals.prompt: Which clubs am I a member of?
evals.expected_output: Runs my_clubs.py. Shows a list of clubs with roles.
expectations: Shows club names and roles, or indicates no clubs if empty

evals.prompt: Who are the members of club_abc123?
evals.expected_output: Runs members.py with the club_id. Shows member list with roles.
expectations: Shows member sub, role, and joined_at

evals.prompt: Show me all invite links for club_abc123.
evals.expected_output: Runs list_invite_links.py with the club_id. Shows tokens, roles, and usage.
expectations: Shows invite link tokens with role and use count

evals.prompt: Revoke the invite link a1b2c3d4 from club_abc123.
evals.expected_output: Runs revoke_invite_link.py with club_id and token. Confirms revocation.
expectations: Shows confirmation that the invite link was revoked
